g.text: AI Power & Cooling Stress Index — seven DC districts
Lower aggregate = more accommodating; Ahmedabad and Visakhapatnam lowest, Bengaluru and Hyderabad highest
Source: CGWB Ground Water Resource Assessment 2024; CEA dashboard; KERC/MERC/APERC tariff orders; Techadyant Labs scoring.
